_comment.description:
A scrollable list of project cards displayed on the Project Details page. Each card shows the project code, 
    title (wrapped across two lines if over 90 characters), agency, approval year and ExCom meeting number, completion year, approved budget, and funds disbursed. 
    Rows alternate between white and light blue backgrounds. A green dot indicates an ongoing project; grey indicates completed. A blue left-edge accent bar is applied to each card. 
    Cards are dynamically sized — rows with long titles are taller to accommodate the second title line.

transform._comment: Sort by most recently approved projects first
Wrap long titles — Line 1 is the first ~90 characters, broken at the last space
transform.expr: length(datum['Project Title']) > 90 ? slice(datum['Project Title'], 0, lastindexof(slice(datum['Project Title'], 0, 90), ' ')) : datum['Project Title']

transform._comment: Line 2 is the remainder after the break point. Empty string if title fits on one line.
transform.expr: length(datum['Project Title']) > 90 ? slice(datum['Project Title'], lastindexof(slice(datum['Project Title'], 0, 90), ' ') + 1) : ''

transform._comment: Rows with two title lines are 118px tall; single-line rows are 103px
Row number used to determine alternating background colour
Alternating row background: light blue for even rows, white for odd
Status indicator colour: green for ongoing (ONG), grey for all others
Ordinal suffix for ExCom meeting number (e.g. 97th, 1st, 2nd, 3rd)
First info line: agency, approval year, ExCom meeting, and completion year
transform.expr: 'Agency: ' + datum['Agency'] + '  |  Approved: ' + datum['Year_Approved'] + ' (' + datum['Mtg'] + datum['MtgSuffix'] + ' Meeting)  |  Completed: ' + (datum['Year Completed'] ? datum['Year Completed'] : '-')

transform._comment: Second info line: approved budget and disbursed funds in full dollar format
transform.expr: 'Budget: $' + format(datum['Funds Approved'], ',.0f') + '  |  Disbursed: $' + format(datum['Funds Disbursed with PSC'], ',.0f')

data._comment: Cumulative sum of row heights to determine the Y position of each card
data.name: dataset_positioned

transform._comment: YPos is the top of each card — YEnd minus its own height

signals._comment: Total visual height is the YEnd of the last row — grows dynamically with the number of projects
signals.name: totalHeight

marks._comment: Row background rect — alternates between white and light blue
Blue left-edge accent bar — 4px wide, spans full card height
Status dot — green circle for ongoing, grey for completed/closed
Project code — bold blue, top of card
Project title line 2 — only visible when title exceeds 90 characters
Info line 1 — agency, approval year, ExCom meeting, completion year. Shifts down when title wraps.
Info line 2 — budget and disbursement figures. Shifts down when title wraps.
